metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

properties.description: GoogleSecOps data connector with template version 3.0.0

connectorUiConfig.title: Google SecOps Detection Alerts
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The [Google SecOps](https://cloud.google.com/security/products/security-operations) (formerly Chronicle) data connector provides the capability to ingest detection alerts from Google SecOps into Microsoft Sentinel using the [legacyStreamDetectionAlerts](https://cloud.google.com/chronicle/docs/reference/rest/v1alpha/projects.locations.instances.legacy/legacyStreamDetectionAlerts) API.

## Architecture

This connector uses a **two-function polling design**:

1. **GoogleSecOpsToStorage**: Polls the Google SecOps API on a configurable schedule and saves raw detection batches to Azure File Share
2. **AzureStorageToSentinel**: Monitors the file share and ingests saved detections into Microsoft Sentinel via the Logs Ingestion API (DCR)

Key features:
- **Real-time polling**: Configurable schedule (default: every 10 minutes)
- **Checkpoint management**: Tracks pagination tokens and time windows to prevent data loss
- **Automatic lookback**: On first run, pulls data from N days ago (configurable 1-7 days, default 1)
- **Streaming response handling**: Handles large API responses with per-message timeout detection
- **Raw data preservation**: Saves complete API responses for audit and reprocessing
- **Sentinel DCR integration**: Posts detection alerts to custom table via Azure Monitor Ingestion API

**Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:**

This solution depends on the following technologies, and some of which may be in [Preview](https://azure.microsoft.com/support/legal/preview-supplemental-terms/) state or may incur additional ingestion or operational costs:

- [Azure Functions](https://azure.microsoft.com/services/functions/) (Python 3.12 runtime)
- [Azure File Share](https://azure.microsoft.com/services/storage/files/) (for checkpoint and raw data storage)
- [Azure Monitor Ingestion API](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/logs/logs-ingestion-api-overview) (DCR-based)
- [Azure Key Vault](https://azure.microsoft.com/services/key-vault/) (optional for credential storage)

sampleQueries.query:
GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
 | sort by detection_time desc
 | take 10

GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
 | summarize Count=count() by severity
 | sort by Count desc

GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
 | where alert_state == 'ALERTING'
 | summarize Count=count() by rule_name
 | sort by Count desc
 | take 10

GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
 | extend Hour = bin(detection_time, 1h)
 | summarize Count=count() by Hour, severity
 | render columnchart

dataTypes.name: GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

value:
GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(30d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions on the workspace are required.
Write permissions to Data Collection Rules are required.
Write permissions to Data Collection Endpoints are required.

customs.name: Microsoft.Web/sites permissions
customs.description: Read and write permissions to Azure Functions to create a Function App is required. [See the documentation to learn more about Azure Functions](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-functions/).

customs.name: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts permissions
customs.description: Read and write permissions to Azure Storage Account for File Share operations are required.

customs.name: Microsoft Entra ID App Registration
customs.description: An app registration with API permissions for Azure Monitor Ingestion is required for posting data to Sentinel.

customs.name: Google Cloud Service Account
customs.description: A Google Cloud service account with SecOps API access is required. The service account JSON key must be provided during deployment. [See the documentation to learn more about Google SecOps API access](https://cloud.google.com/chronicle/docs/reference/rest).

instructionSteps.description:
>**NOTE:** This connector uses two Azure Functions to connect to the Google SecOps API:

- **GoogleSecOpsToStorage**: Polls the Google SecOps API on a schedule and saves raw detection batches to Azure File Share
- **AzureStorageToSentinel**: Monitors the file share and ingests saved detections into Microsoft Sentinel

This architecture ensures zero data loss with checkpoint management and prevents duplicate ingestion.
instructionSteps.title: Information

instructionSteps.description:
>**NOTE:** This connector uses Azure Functions and Azure Storage, which may result in additional costs. Review pricing:
- [Azure Functions pricing](https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/functions/)
- [Azure Storage pricing](https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/storage/blobs/)
instructionSteps.title: Cost Warning

instructionSteps.description:
**Step 1: Set up Google SecOps Service Account**

1. Ensure you have a Google SecOps (Chronicle) instance
2. Go to the [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/) and select the project associated with your Google SecOps instance
3. Navigate to **IAM & Admin > Service Accounts** and click **Create Service Account**
4. Enter a name (e.g., `secops-api-sa`) and click **Create and Continue**
5. Assign a role with permission: `chronicle.legacies.legacyStreamDetectionAlerts`
6. Click **Create key** > **JSON** to download the service account credentials
7. Note down your **SecOps Project ID**, **Region**, and **Instance ID** from the Google SecOps console
instructionSteps.title: Google SecOps Configuration

instructionSteps.description:
**Step 2: Create App Registration for Sentinel Ingestion**

1. Sign in to the [Azure portal](https://portal.azure.com/)
2. Search for and select **Microsoft Entra ID**
3. Under **Manage**, select **App registrations > New registration**
4. Enter a display **Name** (e.g., `gcs-detection-alerts-app`)
5. Select **Register**
6. Record the **Application (client) ID** and **Tenant ID**
7. Under **Certificates & secrets**, create a **New client secret** and save the value
8. Under **API permissions**, add **Monitoring.Write** for Azure Monitor Ingestion
instructionSteps.title: Azure App Registration

instructionSteps.description:
**Step 3: Get Sentinel Resources**

1. In the Azure portal, go to your **Log Analytics workspace**
2. Note the **Workspace name** and **Resource group**
3. Go to **Access control (IAM)** and note your **Azure Entra Object ID** (User ID)
4. These will be used during function deployment
instructionSteps.title: Sentinel Configuration

instructionSteps.description:
Use this method for automated deployment of the Google SecOps Detection Alerts connector.

1. Click the **Deploy to Azure** button below. 

	[![Deploy To Azure](https://aka.ms/deploytoazurebutton)](https://portal.azure.com/#create/Microsoft.Template/uri/https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fdevendra-chavda%2FGoogleSecOps%2Frefs%2Fheads%2Fmain%2FData%2520Connectors%2FGoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts%2Fazuredeploy_Connector_GSDetectionAlerts_API_AzureFunction.json)

2. Select the preferred **Subscription**, **Resource Group** and **Location**. 

3. Enter the below information in the deployment form:
	- **FunctionName**: Prefix for your function app (1-11 chars).
	- **Location**: Region for data collection rules and data collection endpoints deployment.
	- **WorkspaceName**: Your Log Analytics workspace name.
	- **GCSDetectionAlertsTableName**: Custom table name for detection alerts (default: GCSDetectionAlerts).
	- **SecOpsProjectId**: Google Cloud project ID hosting the SecOps instance.
	- **SecOpsRegion**: SecOps instance region (select from the dropdown list of supported regions).
	- **SecOpsInstanceId**: SecOps instance ID.
	- **SecOpsServiceAccountJson**: Full JSON content of the Google Cloud service-account key.
	- **LookbackDays**: Days to look back for initial data pull (1-7, default: 1).
	- **FatchSchedule**: Timer-trigger CRON expression for the fetch function (default: 0 */10 * * * * = every 10 minutes).
	- **IngestSchedule**: Timer-trigger CRON expression for the ingest function (default: 0 2/10 * * * * = every 10 minutes offset by 2).
	- **AzureClientId**: App registration client ID.
	- **AzureClientSecret**: App registration client secret.
	- **AzureEntraObjectID**: Object ID of your Microsoft Entra App (from Enterprise Applications).
	- **TenantId**: Tenant ID of your Microsoft Entra ID.
	- **LogLevel**: Application log level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR - default: INFO).
	- **Scope**: Google OAuth scope for service account authentication (default: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform).
	- **AppInsightsWorkspaceResourceID**: Fully qualified Log Analytics workspace resource ID for Application Insights.

4. Mark the checkbox labeled **I agree to the terms and conditions stated above**. 

5. Click **Review + Create** and then **Create** to deploy
instructionSteps.title: Azure Resource Manager (ARM) Template

instructionSteps.description:
**Step 5: Verify Data Ingestion**

1. After deployment completes (10-20 minutes), go to your Log Analytics workspace
2. Run this query to verify data is arriving:
   ```kusto
   GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
   | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
   | summarize Count=count()
   ```
instructionSteps.title: Verify Ingestion

properties.description: GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts Data Parser with template version 3.0.0

properties.query:
let SeverityLookup = datatable(
    severity: string,
    severity_level: int
)[
    "CRITICAL", 5,
    "HIGH", 4,
    "MEDIUM", 3,
    "LOW", 2,
    "INFO", 1
];
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, id: string) [];
let GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts = view () {
    union isfuzzy=true dummy_table,
    GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
    | extend
        detection_array=column_ifexists("detection", dynamic([]))
    | where isnotnull(detection_array) and array_length(detection_array) > 0
    | mv-expand detection=detection_array
    | extend
        DetectionType=column_ifexists("DetectionType", ""),
        createdTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("createdTime [UTC]", "")),
        id=column_ifexists("id", ""),
        timeWindow=column_ifexists("timeWindow", dynamic(null)),
        timeWindow_startTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("timeWindow_startTime [UTC]", "")),
        timeWindow_endTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("timeWindow_endTime [UTC]", "")),
        collectionElements=column_ifexists("collectionElements", dynamic(null)),
        detectionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("detectionTime [UTC]", "")),
        detectionTimingDetails=column_ifexists("detectionTimingDetails", dynamic(null)),
        latencyMetrics=column_ifexists("latencyMetrics", dynamic(null)),
        latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_newestEventTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_newestEventTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency=column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency", ""),
        ruleName=tostring(detection.ruleName),
        ruleId=tostring(detection.ruleId),
        ruleVersion=tostring(detection.ruleVersion),
        ruleType=tostring(detection.ruleType),
        severity=tostring(detection.severity),
        alertState=tostring(detection.alertState),
        urlBackToProduct=tostring(detection.urlBackToProduct),
        description=tostring(detection.description),
        detectionFields=detection.detectionFields,
        ruleLabels=detection.ruleLabels,
        outcomes=detection.outcomes
    | lookup SeverityLookup on severity
    | extend
        EventVendor="Google Chronicle Security",
        EventProduct="Chronicle",
        EventType="Detection",
        ts=createdTime,
        detection_id=id,
        alert_state=alertState,
        rule_type=ruleType,
        alert_severity=severity
    | extend
        severity_level=coalesce(severity_level, 0),
        detection_window_duration_seconds=iff(
            isnotnull(timeWindow_startTime) and isnotnull(timeWindow_endTime),
            datetime_diff('second', timeWindow_endTime, timeWindow_startTime),
            int(null)
        ),
        ingestion_latency_seconds=iff(
            isnotnull(latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime) and isnotnull(latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime),
            datetime_diff('second', latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime, latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime),
            int(null)
        )
    | extend
        is_high_severity=iff(severity in ("HIGH", "CRITICAL"), "true", "false"),
        is_active_alert=iff(alertState == "ALERTING", "true", "false")
    | extend
        variables=detection.variables,
        risk_score=toint(detection.riskScore)
    | extend
        var_adversary_name=tostring(variables.adversary_name.value),
        var_adversary_netid=tostring(variables.adversary_netid.value),
        var_adversary_uid=tostring(variables.adversary_uid.value),
        var_correlation_domain=tostring(variables.correlation_domain.value),
        var_correlation_ip=tostring(variables.correlation_ip.value),
        var_cyware_confidence_score=tostring(variables.cyware_confidence_score.value),
        var_e1_email_address=tostring(variables.e1_email_address.value),
        var_e1_ip=tostring(variables.e1_ip.value),
        var_e1_resource_name=tostring(variables.e1_resource_name.value),
        var_e2_email_address=tostring(variables.e2_email_address.value),
        var_e2_ip=tostring(variables.e2_ip.value),
        var_e2_resource_name=tostring(variables.e2_resource_name.value),
        var_email_address=tostring(variables.email_address.value),
        var_event_count=tostring(variables.event_count.value),
        var_ip=tostring(variables.ip.value),
        var_principal_asset_hostname=tostring(variables.principal_asset_hostname.value),
        var_principal_hostname=tostring(variables.principal_hostname.value),
        var_principal_ip=tostring(variables.principal_ip.value),
        var_principal_ip_count=tostring(variables.principal_ip_count.value),
        var_principal_mac=tostring(variables.principal_mac.value),
        var_principal_user_userid=tostring(variables.principal_user_userid.value),
        var_product_name=tostring(variables.product_name.value),
        var_resource_name=tostring(variables.resource_name.value),
        var_result=tostring(variables.result.value),
        var_result_time=tostring(variables.result_time.value),
        var_risk_score=tostring(variables.risk_score.value),
        var_service_account=tostring(variables.service_account.value),
        var_serviceaccount=tostring(variables.serviceaccount.value),
        var_source_hostname=tostring(variables.source_hostname.value),
        var_source_ip=tostring(variables.source_ip.value),
        var_source_ip_count=tostring(variables.source_ip_count.value),
        var_source_mac=tostring(variables.source_mac.value),
        var_source_user_userid=tostring(variables.source_user_userid.value),
        var_target_hostname=tostring(variables.target_hostname.value),
        var_target_ip=tostring(variables.target_ip.value),
        var_target_mac=tostring(variables.target_mac.value),
        var_target_user_userid=tostring(variables.target_user_userid.value),
        var_user=tostring(variables.user.value),
        var_vendor_name=tostring(variables.vendor_name.value),
        var_victim_name=tostring(variables.victim_name.value),
        var_victim_uid=tostring(variables.victim_uid.value)
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        detectionType = DetectionType,
        detection,
        createdTime,
        id,
        timeWindow,
        timeWindowStartTime = timeWindow_startTime,
        timeWindowEndTime = timeWindow_endTime,
        collectionElements,
        detectionTime,
        detectionTimingDetails,
        latencyMetrics,
        latencyMetricsOldestIngestionTime = latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime,
        latencyMetricsNewestIngestionTime = latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime,
        latencyMetricsOldestEventTime = latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime,
        latencyMetricsNewestEventTime = latencyMetrics_newestEventTime,
        latencyMetricsIngestionLatency = latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency,
        eventVendor = EventVendor,
        eventProduct = EventProduct,
        eventType = EventType,
        ts,
        detectionId = detection_id,
        ruleName,
        ruleId,
        ruleVersion,
        ruleType,
        severity,
        severityLevel = severity_level,
        alertState = alert_state,
        isHighSeverity = is_high_severity,
        isActiveAlert = is_active_alert,
        description,
        urlBackToProduct,
        riskScore = risk_score,
        detectionFields,
        ruleLabels,
        outcomes,
        variables,
        varCorrelationIp = var_correlation_ip,
        varPrincipalIp = var_principal_ip,
        varPrincipalIpCount = var_principal_ip_count,
        varSourceIpCount = var_source_ip_count,
        varTargetIp = var_target_ip,
        varTargetHostname = var_target_hostname,
        varTargetUserUserid = var_target_user_userid,
        varSourceIp = var_source_ip,
        varSourceHostname = var_source_hostname,
        varSourceUserUserid = var_source_user_userid,
        varSourceMac = var_source_mac,
        varTargetMac = var_target_mac,
        varPrincipalMac = var_principal_mac,
        varPrincipalHostname = var_principal_hostname,
        varPrincipalUserUserid = var_principal_user_userid,
        detectionWindowDurationSeconds = detection_window_duration_seconds,
        ingestionLatencySeconds = ingestion_latency_seconds
};
GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts

let SeverityLookup = datatable(
    severity: string,
    severity_level: int
)[
    "CRITICAL", 5,
    "HIGH", 4,
    "MEDIUM", 3,
    "LOW", 2,
    "INFO", 1
];
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, id: string) [];
let GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts = view () {
    union isfuzzy=true dummy_table,
    GCSDetectionAlerts_CL
    | extend
        detection_array=column_ifexists("detection", dynamic([]))
    | where isnotnull(detection_array) and array_length(detection_array) > 0
    | mv-expand detection=detection_array
    | extend
        DetectionType=column_ifexists("DetectionType", ""),
        createdTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("createdTime [UTC]", "")),
        id=column_ifexists("id", ""),
        timeWindow=column_ifexists("timeWindow", dynamic(null)),
        timeWindow_startTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("timeWindow_startTime [UTC]", "")),
        timeWindow_endTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("timeWindow_endTime [UTC]", "")),
        collectionElements=column_ifexists("collectionElements", dynamic(null)),
        detectionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("detectionTime [UTC]", "")),
        detectionTimingDetails=column_ifexists("detectionTimingDetails", dynamic(null)),
        latencyMetrics=column_ifexists("latencyMetrics", dynamic(null)),
        latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_newestEventTime=todatetime(column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_newestEventTime [UTC]", "")),
        latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency=column_ifexists("latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency", ""),
        ruleName=tostring(detection.ruleName),
        ruleId=tostring(detection.ruleId),
        ruleVersion=tostring(detection.ruleVersion),
        ruleType=tostring(detection.ruleType),
        severity=tostring(detection.severity),
        alertState=tostring(detection.alertState),
        urlBackToProduct=tostring(detection.urlBackToProduct),
        description=tostring(detection.description),
        detectionFields=detection.detectionFields,
        ruleLabels=detection.ruleLabels,
        outcomes=detection.outcomes
    | lookup SeverityLookup on severity
    | extend
        EventVendor="Google Chronicle Security",
        EventProduct="Chronicle",
        EventType="Detection",
        ts=createdTime,
        detection_id=id,
        alert_state=alertState,
        rule_type=ruleType,
        alert_severity=severity
    | extend
        severity_level=coalesce(severity_level, 0),
        detection_window_duration_seconds=iff(
            isnotnull(timeWindow_startTime) and isnotnull(timeWindow_endTime),
            datetime_diff('second', timeWindow_endTime, timeWindow_startTime),
            int(null)
        ),
        ingestion_latency_seconds=iff(
            isnotnull(latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime) and isnotnull(latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime),
            datetime_diff('second', latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime, latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime),
            int(null)
        )
    | extend
        is_high_severity=iff(severity in ("HIGH", "CRITICAL"), "true", "false"),
        is_active_alert=iff(alertState == "ALERTING", "true", "false")
    | extend
        variables=detection.variables,
        risk_score=toint(detection.riskScore)
    | extend
        var_adversary_name=tostring(variables.adversary_name.value),
        var_adversary_netid=tostring(variables.adversary_netid.value),
        var_adversary_uid=tostring(variables.adversary_uid.value),
        var_correlation_domain=tostring(variables.correlation_domain.value),
        var_correlation_ip=tostring(variables.correlation_ip.value),
        var_cyware_confidence_score=tostring(variables.cyware_confidence_score.value),
        var_e1_email_address=tostring(variables.e1_email_address.value),
        var_e1_ip=tostring(variables.e1_ip.value),
        var_e1_resource_name=tostring(variables.e1_resource_name.value),
        var_e2_email_address=tostring(variables.e2_email_address.value),
        var_e2_ip=tostring(variables.e2_ip.value),
        var_e2_resource_name=tostring(variables.e2_resource_name.value),
        var_email_address=tostring(variables.email_address.value),
        var_event_count=tostring(variables.event_count.value),
        var_ip=tostring(variables.ip.value),
        var_principal_asset_hostname=tostring(variables.principal_asset_hostname.value),
        var_principal_hostname=tostring(variables.principal_hostname.value),
        var_principal_ip=tostring(variables.principal_ip.value),
        var_principal_ip_count=tostring(variables.principal_ip_count.value),
        var_principal_mac=tostring(variables.principal_mac.value),
        var_principal_user_userid=tostring(variables.principal_user_userid.value),
        var_product_name=tostring(variables.product_name.value),
        var_resource_name=tostring(variables.resource_name.value),
        var_result=tostring(variables.result.value),
        var_result_time=tostring(variables.result_time.value),
        var_risk_score=tostring(variables.risk_score.value),
        var_service_account=tostring(variables.service_account.value),
        var_serviceaccount=tostring(variables.serviceaccount.value),
        var_source_hostname=tostring(variables.source_hostname.value),
        var_source_ip=tostring(variables.source_ip.value),
        var_source_ip_count=tostring(variables.source_ip_count.value),
        var_source_mac=tostring(variables.source_mac.value),
        var_source_user_userid=tostring(variables.source_user_userid.value),
        var_target_hostname=tostring(variables.target_hostname.value),
        var_target_ip=tostring(variables.target_ip.value),
        var_target_mac=tostring(variables.target_mac.value),
        var_target_user_userid=tostring(variables.target_user_userid.value),
        var_user=tostring(variables.user.value),
        var_vendor_name=tostring(variables.vendor_name.value),
        var_victim_name=tostring(variables.victim_name.value),
        var_victim_uid=tostring(variables.victim_uid.value)
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        detectionType = DetectionType,
        detection,
        createdTime,
        id,
        timeWindow,
        timeWindowStartTime = timeWindow_startTime,
        timeWindowEndTime = timeWindow_endTime,
        collectionElements,
        detectionTime,
        detectionTimingDetails,
        latencyMetrics,
        latencyMetricsOldestIngestionTime = latencyMetrics_oldestIngestionTime,
        latencyMetricsNewestIngestionTime = latencyMetrics_newestIngestionTime,
        latencyMetricsOldestEventTime = latencyMetrics_oldestEventTime,
        latencyMetricsNewestEventTime = latencyMetrics_newestEventTime,
        latencyMetricsIngestionLatency = latencyMetrics_ingestionLatency,
        eventVendor = EventVendor,
        eventProduct = EventProduct,
        eventType = EventType,
        ts,
        detectionId = detection_id,
        ruleName,
        ruleId,
        ruleVersion,
        ruleType,
        severity,
        severityLevel = severity_level,
        alertState = alert_state,
        isHighSeverity = is_high_severity,
        isActiveAlert = is_active_alert,
        description,
        urlBackToProduct,
        riskScore = risk_score,
        detectionFields,
        ruleLabels,
        outcomes,
        variables,
        varCorrelationIp = var_correlation_ip,
        varPrincipalIp = var_principal_ip,
        varPrincipalIpCount = var_principal_ip_count,
        varSourceIpCount = var_source_ip_count,
        varTargetIp = var_target_ip,
        varTargetHostname = var_target_hostname,
        varTargetUserUserid = var_target_user_userid,
        varSourceIp = var_source_ip,
        varSourceHostname = var_source_hostname,
        varSourceUserUserid = var_source_user_userid,
        varSourceMac = var_source_mac,
        varTargetMac = var_target_mac,
        varPrincipalMac = var_principal_mac,
        varPrincipalHostname = var_principal_hostname,
        varPrincipalUserUserid = var_principal_user_userid,
        detectionWindowDurationSeconds = detection_window_duration_seconds,
        ingestionLatencySeconds = ingestion_latency_seconds
};
GoogleSecOpsDetectionAlerts

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Google SecOps solution for Microsoft Sentinel provides the capability to ingest detection alerts from Google SecOps (formerly Chronicle) into Microsoft Sentinel using the legacyStreamDetectionAlerts API.

Data Connectors: 1, Parsers: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
